message:
feat: Add Two-Flow alignment for control flow and collections

Phase 6 Two-Flow alignment:
- for_basic.zig: Add PyValue iteration handling with comptime type dispatch
  to handle PyValue.list ([]const PyValue) correctly instead of assuming ArrayList
- while.zig: Add .pyvalue type check alongside isUnknown() for condition truthiness
- collections.zig: Add explicit uncertainty checks for genList(), genDict(), genSet()
  with appropriate handling for PyValue types
